見有人問有咩數學書睇, 不如集各位連登大神的意見啦
topics可以cover ug year 2 up to pg year 1-2
謝絕cookbook類書, 例如 stewart, boyce & diprima
最少打作者個姓同書名

Functional Analysis:
Rynne - Linear Functional Analysis (suitable for beginners)

Reed & Simon - Methods of Modern Mathematical Physics Vol. I - Functional Analysis (more focus on linear operators on Hilbert spaces and have some mathematical physics topics)

Megginson - Introduction to Banach Space Theory (intended for studying Banach spaces in more detail)

Differential Geometry:
Do Carmo - Differential Geometry of Curves and Surfaces (classical reference)

O'Neill - Elementary Differential Geometry (excellent for beginners)

Abstract Algebra:
Dummit & Foote - Abstract Algebra (exhaustive & detailed treatments, many exercises and examples, may be better served as a reference)

Computational Complexity Theory:

Arora, Barak - Computational Complexity, a modern approach (a complete coverage of essential topics in the fields, including many modern topics like communication complexity, quantum computing)

Sipser - Introduction to the theory of computation (very beginner-friendly textbook teaches you finite automata, Turing machines, complexity theory, etc.)
